_doc: Horus-Heresy book supplement for the Ask HH hard gate (Brief 164). WHY THIS EXISTS: the catalogue cannot date most books — primaryEraId is uniformly 'time_ending' for all 889 books (zero signal) and startY is null for ~792 of them; there is no setting/millennium facet. So the date-band detector in isHeresyBook (startY in [30000,32000)) only catches the ~23 HH books that carry a real M31 startY (the numbered novels: Horus Rising, False Gods, Betrayer, …). This list supplements it with HH books that lack a usable startY, so newcomers don't get dropped into the Heresy. Joined in-memory by slug (src/lib/ask/heresy-books.ts); no DB schema. STARTER LIST — high-confidence HH-era titles only; known M41 books that merely share a Heresy-flavoured name are deliberately excluded (e.g. The Talon of Horus = M41 Black Legion, Legion of the Damned = M41). Philipp confirms/extends before merge, and the real fix is a startY/era backfill in the Batches strand.
